name: AcmeCorp CloudMonitor Pro
description: Real-time infrastructure monitoring platform with AI-powered anomaly detection, multi-cloud dashboards, and automated alerting for enterprise workloads.

name: AcmeCorp LogStream Analyzer
description: Centralized log management and analysis tool with pattern recognition, compliance reporting, and real-time search across distributed systems.

name: AcmeCorp DataSync Enterprise
description: High-throughput data integration and synchronization platform supporting 200+ connectors, real-time CDC (Change Data Capture), and automated data pipelines.

name: AcmeCorp StreamBridge
description: Event-driven data streaming service built on Apache Kafka architecture. Enables real-time data flow between microservices, databases, and analytics platforms.

name: AcmeCorp FullStack Observability Suite
description: End-to-end observability platform combining metrics, traces, and logs with distributed tracing (OpenTelemetry), service maps, and SLA dashboards.

name: AcmeCorp SecureVault IAM
description: Identity and Access Management solution with zero-trust architecture, single sign-on (SSO), multi-factor authentication, and fine-grained RBAC policies.

name: AcmeCorp ThreatShield SIEM
description: Security Information and Event Management platform with real-time threat detection, AI-powered incident correlation, and automated response playbooks.

name: AcmeCorp InsightEngine Analytics
description: Advanced business intelligence and analytics platform with natural language querying, self-service dashboards, predictive analytics, and data storytelling features.

name: AcmeCorp DataLake Warehouse
description: Cloud-native data lakehouse platform unifying data lake storage with data warehouse performance. Supports ACID transactions, time travel queries, and multi-format ingestion.

name: AcmeCorp DevFlow CI/CD Platform
description: Continuous integration and delivery platform with AI-assisted code review, automated testing pipelines, deployment gates, and multi-environment promotion workflows.

name: AcmeCorp InfraForge IaC Suite
description: Infrastructure-as-Code management platform supporting Terraform, Bicep, and Pulumi. Includes drift detection, cost estimation, policy enforcement, and version-controlled deployments.

name: AcmeCorp AI Ops Intelligence
description: AIOps platform that leverages machine learning to predict infrastructure failures, auto-remediate incidents, and optimize resource utilization across hybrid environments.

name: AcmeCorp ComplianceGuard
description: Automated compliance management platform covering SOC 2, ISO 27001, GDPR, HIPAA, and PCI-DSS. Provides continuous evidence collection, audit trails, and remediation guidance.

name: AcmeCorp DataQuality Guardian
description: Data quality monitoring and governance platform with automated profiling, anomaly detection on data pipelines, lineage tracking, and business glossary management.

name: AcmeCorp ContainerOrchestrator
description: Enterprise-grade Kubernetes management platform with multi-cluster federation, auto-scaling policies, cost optimization, and built-in service mesh integration.
